positive: A whimsical, modern minimalist illustration of a stylized forest gnome family having a picnic. The composition is highly symmetrical and central, featuring three gnomes (two adult, one child) and a small checkered blanket. The style is flat vector art mixed with detailed watercolor textures, giving it a storybook feel. Dominant colors are deep emerald green, sapphire blue, ochre yellow, and creamy white. Focus on clean silhouettes and whimsical objects: oversized mushrooms, glowing fireflies in jar silhouettes, and teacups. The artwork must be highly detailed but clean enough to print large on fabric. Crisp lines, high contrast, centered composition, suitable for screen printing.
